response.justification: The candidate substantially exceeds the 6+ years requirement with nearly two decades of full-stack experience, deep TypeScript/Node.js/React work at multiple Berlin companies, current hands-on AI-agent and MCP tooling development, and a strong testing culture (TDD, authored test frameworks). Cloud and container experience (AWS CDK, Docker, Kubernetes) and a CS degree round out the profile. The main gaps are the absence of Nest.js and Kotlin, and limited recent Java/Python evidence, but the demonstrated language breadth suggests these are quickly learnable.
strengths: Extensive full-stack TypeScript/Node.js/React experience across product and platform work
Current AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling experience, directly matching a required skill
Strong engineering practices: TDD, CI/CD, testing framework authorship, and teaching/mentoring
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience, the primary backend framework in the stack
Kotlin absent and Java experience appears dated and secondary
No direct mention of Vitest/Jest/Playwright; testing depth shown mostly in D-language tooling

key_factors.factor: AI agent and MCP development experience
